final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-ready smartphone photo of a Korean café-style latte and dessert, annotated with meaningful hand-drawn notes for each element.

Style/medium: smartphone photo with hand-drawn annotation overlay, Instagram story aesthetic, magazine rough-note style
Composition: flat-lay or slightly angled table-top view, clean framing with intentional negative space
Subject: Korean café latte art coffee and matching dessert (croffle or basque cheesecake), no people
Scene/backdrop: minimalist Korean café interior table, soft natural window light, marble or wood surface
Lighting/mood: bright, airy, warm daylight streaming through café window
Color palette: warm neutrals with cream, beige, soft browns, subtle latte art contrast
Materials/textures: ceramic cup, glossy coffee surface, textured dessert, paper napkin, wooden table grain
Text (verbatim): 日语手写注释 — 饮料：「さわやか」「やさしい甘み」；食物：「しっとり」「さいこう」；空间：「リラックス」「すてきな時間」；整体：「しあわせすぎる～」
Constraints: hand-drawn white fine lines, single-stroke rough uneven style, contour lines tracing object outlines, arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, steam/sparkles/hearts/mini emoticons as decoration, 70% hiragana 30% simple kanji, diary-like short comments, leave intentional blank space, no overcrowding
Avoid: heavy shadows, cluttered composition, Western café aesthetic, generic stock photo look, excessive decoration covering the subject
